Build Your
Privacy Policy
and Terms of Use
- Everyone should have a Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.
- We provide an example for US businesses.
- Refer to your own Legal Counsel to verify the content
meets the needs for your unique business.
- Best practices for your Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.
